## Summary

What changed and why?

## Type of Change

- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Firmware
- [ ] Backend API
- [ ] Browser automation
- [ ] Hardware docs
- [ ] Build/tooling

## Validation

- [ ] Python compile/import check
- [ ] Arduino compile check
- [ ] Live automation validation
- [ ] Documentation links reviewed
- [ ] Not applicable

## Safety Checklist

- [ ] I did not commit `config.h`
- [ ] I did not commit `server/blinkit-profile/`
- [ ] I did not commit cookies, local storage, session storage, or browser data
- [ ] I did not commit debug screenshots or HTML dumps with account data
- [ ] I did not click or automate payment/final order placement

## Notes for Reviewers

Anything reviewers should pay special attention to?
